headline: Missing Teen Reunited with Father After Three Years
meta_description: A 14-year-old boy who disappeared three years ago has been found and reunited with his father, bringing an end to years of searching.
summary_short: A teenager who went missing three years ago has been found and reunited with his father, ending a long family separation.
body:
After three years of uncertainty and searching, a young teenager has been found and brought back together with his father. The reunion marks the end of a painful period for the family, who held onto hope throughout the lengthy separation.

The boy's return demonstrates the resilience of both the young person and his father. Despite the difficult experiences he endured during his time away, this reunion offers the family a chance to rebuild and move forward together.
